deliverables.description: Executable endpoint adjudication audit workbook with packet inputs, formulas, remediation scenarios, sensitivity flags, validation checks, and summary decision table.
Query memo documenting packet-only formulas, assumptions, citations, validation checks, sensitivity notes, budget-compliant remediation analysis, and final decision table.

excluded_over_budget_combinations.note: Excluded despite clearing R3 under assumptions because it exceeds remediation_budget_usd.

explicit_assumptions_needing_review: The packet did not define observed_risk_score weights, so the workbook uses equal-weight normalized drivers.
event_day is normalized by MAX(event_day) from packet records because no trial duration or external horizon is provided.
endpoint_status=1 is treated as endpoint-status risk contribution; packet does not define directionality.
O3 margin improvement is modeled as threshold * 9% added to margin; packet does not define the denominator for the 9% effect.
The 5% sensitivity test uses paired adverse/favorable shifts to observed_risk_score and normalized_threshold_score.

recommended_budget_compliant_remediation.rationale: Best feasible average margin lift under the explicit packet-only assumptions; clears R4 warning to pass but leaves R3 slightly negative.

validation_summary.renderer_limitation: No @oai/artifact-tool, LibreOffice, or equivalent spreadsheet renderer was available in the sandbox; validation used zip/XML/formula inspection.

task: Perform an endpoint adjudication consistency audit using only the embedded packet. Separate confirmed failures from warnings, compute the economic/safety margin using margin = normalized_threshold_score - observed_risk_score, apply the pass/warn/fail rules (negative = fail; 0 to 5% of threshold = warn; >5% = pass), consider remediation options only if combined cost <= remediation_budget_usd, mark expert_review required when any record changes classification after a 5% sensitivity shift, and produce an executable spreadsheet (endpoint_adjudication_audit.xlsx) and a query memo (query_memo.md) containing formulas/executable logic, intermediate calculations, row-level citations to the embedded packet, explicit assumptions, validation checks, sensitivity notes, and a final decision table. Do not use outside data; mark unresolved ambiguity as needs_review.
